title: Fliki AI video editor review
excerpt: One of the easiest ways to create AI-powered videos, backed by a modern interface and an impressive range of creative tools
content_html:
Fliki is one of the best AI video generation and editing platforms, priced on par with other similar tools, especially during the discount season. Its new dashboard and layout make it easy to use and beginner-friendly. You can create videos from simple prompts, generate scripts, or create AI images right from a single prompt box. There’s also a pretty handy AI assistant to help you edit videos using natural language inputs. That said, its free plan is a bit limited, and without discounts, it can be a little expensive.

Pros

  • +

    Easy editing with AI Copilot

  • +

    Licensed YouTube music

  • +

    Stop-motion videos supported

  • +

    Lots of customization options

Cons

  • -

    Limited free plan

  • -

    Videos in 1080p only

Fliki is a popular AI video generator, trusted by more than 12 million users worldwide and 50,000 companies, including brands like Meta, ByteDance, Oracle, and PayPal. You can create and edit AI videos with natural-language prompts using its AI Copilot.

In this article, we’ve put Fliki to the test, evaluating its features, pricing, and real-world in-app experience to help you find out whether this AI video editor lives up to its claims and whether it’s the right tool for you.

Fliki: Plans and pricing

Fliki is a fairly limited free video editing software, which gives you three credits per month, or 36 credits for the entire year. You can export videos with a maximum length of one minute in 720p resolution, along with access to 300 standard voices. All other video and audio generation features are limited on the free plan and restricted by the number of credits you receive.

Latest Videos From

We found the provision of just three credits per month quite stingy. For instance, generating a one-minute AI video costs around 0.8 credits. If it includes an AI avatar, it can cost around 5.3 credits alone. This means you can't do much with the free plan besides testing out the platform.

To get the most out of Fliki, you'll have to subscribe to one of its paid plans. Its Standard plan starts at $28 per month. Right now, you can get 50% off the subscription, bringing the effective price down to $14 per month. With this plan, you get 2,160 credits for the entire year, along with an expanded export length of 15 minutes in 1080p resolution, which disappointed us a bit. Kapwing, for instance, allows you to export videos in 4K quality at around the same price.

You can check out Fliki by clicking here.

That said, you get unlimited access to various video and audio tools, along with features like voice cloning, custom voices, and Brand Kits. You also get access to various templates, which help you create content using pre-built video layouts. This plan also includes several collaboration features, such as the ability to bulk-create videos from a single CSV file, an AI assistant, and Zapier integrations. However, it still does not include team collaboration, which is again a letdown.

Then there's the Premium plan, costing $88 per month, or $44 per month with the current discount. Here, the maximum export length increases to 40 minutes, but the resolution remains capped at 1080p. Some additional features include unlimited AI avatars, custom fonts, faster exports, and team collaboration.

If you've exhausted your credits, you can purchase top-up credits if you have an active subscription plan. These additional credits are valid for up to 180 days and remain active even if your subscription is canceled during this period. You can get 60 credits for $10, 130 credits for $25, and so on, all the way up to $2,500 worth of credits.

Fliki: Features

Fliki houses as many as 54 tools to create and edit videos and images, supporting various use cases. For instance, you can create social media reels, TikTok videos, or a faceless YouTube channel with Fliki.

There’s also the popular AI Avatar feature, which helps you build avatars of your own and reuse them in your videos. Besides this, you also get an AI Script Writer, voice cloning, a subtitle generator, and a pretty fun Talking Photo feature.

That said, we found Fliki’s AI avatars to be based largely on real people, rather than offering the wide range of outlandish and fictional characters we get with a site like Kapwing.

These are better viewed as use cases rather than standalone features. The core feature remains the same: generating videos and images through prompts. These prompts can be in the form of scripts, reference images, videos, or even audio. Editing tools include background removers, translators, and screen recorders.

Fliki has made a lot of recent additions to its available tools, making it a more complete video generation and editing platform. For instance, it has introduced new models such as Flux Klein 2, Nano Banana 2 for images, Kling 3.0, Seedance 2.0 for video, native audio, multi-shot, and P-Video for video and lip-syncing needs.

You can also use your own media in video workflows, along with 130 new character-driven voices in 20+ languages. As recently as February 2026, Fliki rebuilt its voices to include a wider range of emotions, such as laughing, sarcasm, and deadpan, all of which can be fine-tuned using natural language descriptions.

Fliki now also supports YouTube-licensed music protected by copyright. It has also expanded its character library, allowing you to create and reuse AI characters across multiple projects.

One of its most exciting additions has been the ability to create stop-motion story videos with needle-felted wool puppet looks. Another addition is TikTok auto-publishing, which allows you to post videos created through Fliki directly to TikTok by linking your account in Workspace Settings. You can either publish them immediately or set up a drip schedule to release episodes on TikTok.

Fliki: Interface and in use

Getting started with Fliki is very easy. We used a Google account to sign up for the platform, which took less than a minute. Once you’re in, you’re greeted with a dashboard featuring a black background, along with various features highlighted in small red rectangular tabs below a prompt box.

On the left-hand panel, you’ll find all the settings you need for your video creation, including Media, Subtitles, Audio, AI Copilot, and various templates. However, note that not all of these will be accessible if you’re on the free plan, as several features are locked behind Fliki’s paid tiers.

The best part about editing with Fliki is its AI-powered editing assistant, where you can type in plain English what you want. For instance, you can ask it to make the intro slower or add a text overlay at any point in the video.

Besides this, you get two ways to build a video. The first is an at-a-glance scene reel laid out horizontally with a full timeline, while the second is a traditional timeline with functions like zooming and snapping, giving you more control.

Fliki has also overhauled its dashboard, giving it a more intuitive layout with a fresher look and easy-to-access tools.

Fliki: How we tested

We used the free version of Fliki to check out its AI video generation capabilities. We entered the following prompt: A woman in a red coat walks across a rain-soaked city street at night, neon signs reflecting in the puddles, camera slowly tracking alongside her (the same prompt we use for all our AI video testing).

We were impressed by the sheer number of customization options that Fliki offers. Once you enter the prompt, you have to select the video duration you want, with the minimum being 30 seconds. This was a bit disappointing, as we’d have liked to see shorter video generation options as well.

However, Fliki gets to work once you make the selection and generates a detailed script for you. You can edit this script before moving ahead with video generation. Besides this, you get a lot of options to customize your video right before the generation process starts.

For instance, you can choose the format and template, selecting between portrait, square, and landscape modes, along with the type of character you want. You can also select the AI model you want to use for generation, although most of them are Pro features. Besides this, you also have the option to select a voiceover, add captions, or choose an AI avatar.

We found this to be pretty convenient since you can make all the required selections in one place and don’t have to go back and forth through the platform making edits afterward. Once we were done with all the selections, we clicked on Generate Video. The actual video rendering process took less than a minute.

However, since the free tier does not allow you to create AI videos on its own, we were a bit disappointed by the output. The final video consisted of still images with voiceovers instead of a full-fledged video, like we got with Kapwing.

Fliki: Alternatives

While Fliki is a pretty good AI video generator and editor, it does have a few strong competitors. The first one would be Adobe Firefly, which costs around $8.49 per month, around 40% cheaper than Fliki during the discount period.

The biggest advantage of Firefly is its robust workflow features, which allow teams to build virtual storyboards and collaborate in real time, something that Fliki restricts to its highest-tier plan. You also get access to Adobe Express Premium and Photoshop with all its paid plans. That said, its video editing capabilities are still in development and are not as good as Fliki’s.

Another competitor is Kapwing, which comes with better AI avatar generation capabilities. While Fliki depends heavily on real-life characters, Kapwing gives you a lot of fictional character generation options, such as Dracula, vampires, and everything else you can imagine.

Kapwing also supports 4K video exports of up to 120 minutes, whereas Fliki restricts exports to just 1080p, which is certainly not enough in the modern content creation landscape. That said, Kapwing is a bit more expensive than Fliki, costing $16 per month. However, its free plan is more robust, allowing you to create AI videos instead of videos with still images and voiceovers.

Fliki: Final verdict

We used the free version of Fliki to check out its AI video generation capabilities. We entered the following prompt: A woman in a red coat walks across a rain-soaked city street at night, neon signs reflecting in the puddles, camera slowly tracking alongside her (the same prompt we use for all our AI video testing).

We were impressed by the sheer number of customization options that Fliki offers. Once you enter the prompt, you have to select the video duration you want, with the minimum being 30 seconds. This was a bit disappointing, as we’d have liked to see shorter video generation options as well.

However, Fliki gets to work once you make the selection and generates a detailed script for you. You can edit this script before moving ahead with video generation. Besides this, you get a lot of options to customize your video right before the generation process starts.

If it includes an AI avatar, it can cost around 5.3 credits alone. This means you can't do much with the free plan besides testing out the platform.

sentences.en: We found the provision of just three credits per month quite stingy.
sentences.zh: 我们发现每月仅提供三个学分是相当吝啬的。

sentences.en: For instance, generating a one-minute AI video costs around 0.8 credits.
sentences.zh: 例如，生成一分钟的 AI 视频大约需要 0.8 个积分。

sentences.en: If it includes an AI avatar, it can cost around 5.3 credits alone.
sentences.zh: 如果包含 AI 头像，则仅花费大约 5.3 个学分。

sentences.en: This means you can't do much with the free plan besides testing out the platform.
sentences.zh: 这意味着除了测试平台之外，您不能使用免费计划做太多事情。

blocks.html_en: To get the most out of Fliki, you'll have to subscribe to one of its paid plans. Its Standard plan starts at $28 per month. Right now, you can get 50% off the subscription, bringing the effective price down to $14 per month. With this plan, you get 2,160 credits for the entire year, along with an expanded export length of 15 minutes in 1080p resolution, which disappointed us a bit. Kapwing, for instance, allows you to export videos in 4K quality at around the same price.

sentences.en: To get the most out of Fliki, you'll have to subscribe to one of its paid plans.

sentences.en: Its Standard plan starts at $28 per month.
sentences.zh: 其标准计划起价为每月 28 美元。

sentences.zh: 通过这个计划，你全年可以获得 2,160 个学分，并且在 1080p 分辨率下导出时长增加了 15 分钟，这让我们有点失望。

sentences.zh: 例如，Kapwing 允许您以大致相同的价格导出 4K 质量的视频。

blocks.html_en: You can check out Fliki by clicking here.

blocks.html_en: That said, you get unlimited access to various video and audio tools, along with features like voice cloning, custom voices, and Brand Kits. You also get access to various templates, which help you create content using pre-built video layouts. This plan also includes several collaboration features, such as the ability to bulk-create videos from a single CSV file, an AI assistant, and Zapier integrations. However, it still does not include team collaboration, which is again a letdown.

sentences.en: That said, you get unlimited access to various video and audio tools, along with features like voice cloning, custom voices, and Brand Kits.
sentences.zh: 也就是说，您可以无限制地访问各种视频和音频工具，以及语音克隆、自定义语音和品牌套件等功能。

sentences.en: You also get access to various templates, which help you create content using pre-built video layouts.
sentences.zh: 您还可以访问各种模板，这些模板可帮助您使用预构建的视频布局创建内容。

sentences.en: This plan also includes several collaboration features, such as the ability to bulk-create videos from a single CSV file, an AI assistant, and Zapier integrations.
sentences.zh: 该计划还包括多项协作功能，例如从单个 CSV 文件批量创建视频的能力、AI 助手和 Zapier 集成。

sentences.en: However, it still does not include team collaboration, which is again a letdown.
sentences.zh: 然而，它仍然不包括团队协作，这再次令人失望。

blocks.html_en: Are you a pro? Subscribe to our newsletter

sentences.en: Are you a pro?
sentences.zh: 你是专业人士吗？

sentences.en: Subscribe to our newsletter
sentences.zh: 订阅我们的时事通讯

blocks.html_en: Sign up to the TechRadar Pro newsletter to get all the top news, opinion, features and guidance your business needs to succeed!

sentences.zh: 订阅 TechRadar Pro 时事通讯，获取您的企业成功所需的所有热门新闻、观点、功能和指导！

blocks.html_en: Then there's the Premium plan, costing $88 per month, or $44 per month with the current discount. Here, the maximum export length increases to 40 minutes, but the resolution remains capped at 1080p. Some additional features include unlimited AI avatars, custom fonts, faster exports, and team collaboration.

sentences.en: Then there's the Premium plan, costing $88 per month, or $44 per month with the current discount.

sentences.en: Here, the maximum export length increases to 40 minutes, but the resolution remains capped at 1080p.

blocks.html_en: If you've exhausted your credits, you can purchase top-up credits if you have an active subscription plan. These additional credits are valid for up to 180 days and remain active even if your subscription is canceled during this period. You can get 60 credits for $10, 130 credits for $25, and so on, all the way up to $2,500 worth of credits.

sentences.en: If you've exhausted your credits, you can purchase top-up credits if you have an active subscription plan.

blocks.html_en: Fliki: Features

sentences.en: Fliki: Features
sentences.zh: 补丁：功能

blocks.html_en: Fliki houses as many as 54 tools to create and edit videos and images, supporting various use cases. For instance, you can create social media reels, TikTok videos, or a faceless YouTube channel with Fliki.

sentences.en: Fliki houses as many as 54 tools to create and edit videos and images, supporting various use cases.
sentences.zh: Fliki 拥有多达 54 个用于创建和编辑视频和图像的工具，支持各种用例。

sentences.en: For instance, you can create social media reels, TikTok videos, or a faceless YouTube channel with Fliki.
sentences.zh: 例如，您可以使用 Fliki 创建社交媒体卷轴、TikTok 视频或匿名 YouTube 频道。

blocks.html_en: There’s also the popular AI Avatar feature, which helps you build avatars of your own and reuse them in your videos. Besides this, you also get an AI Script Writer, voice cloning, a subtitle generator, and a pretty fun Talking Photo feature.

sentences.en: There’s also the popular AI Avatar feature, which helps you build avatars of your own and reuse them in your videos.
sentences.zh: 还有流行的人工智能头像功能，它可以帮助您构建自己的头像并在视频中重复使用它们。

sentences.en: Besides this, you also get an AI Script Writer, voice cloning, a subtitle generator, and a pretty fun Talking Photo feature.
sentences.zh: 除此之外，您还可以获得人工智能脚本编写器、语音克隆、字幕生成器和非常有趣的会说话的照片功能。

blocks.html_en: That said, we found Fliki’s AI avatars to be based largely on real people, rather than offering the wide range of outlandish and fictional characters we get with a site like Kapwing.

sentences.en: That said, we found Fliki’s AI avatars to be based largely on real people, rather than offering the wide range of outlandish and fictional characters we get with a site like Kapwing.
sentences.zh: 也就是说，我们发现 Fliki 的人工智能头像主要基于真人，而不是像 Kapwing 这样的网站提供各种稀奇古怪和虚构的角色。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Fliki)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：Fliki）

blocks.html_en: These are better viewed as use cases rather than standalone features. The core feature remains the same: generating videos and images through prompts. These prompts can be in the form of scripts, reference images, videos, or even audio. Editing tools include background removers, translators, and screen recorders.

sentences.en: These are better viewed as use cases rather than standalone features.
sentences.zh: 这些最好被视为用例而不是独立功能。

sentences.en: The core feature remains the same: generating videos and images through prompts.
sentences.zh: 核心功能保持不变：通过提示生成视频和图像。

sentences.en: These prompts can be in the form of scripts, reference images, videos, or even audio.
sentences.zh: 这些提示可以是脚本、参考图像、视频甚至音频的形式。

sentences.en: Editing tools include background removers, translators, and screen recorders.
sentences.zh: 编辑工具包括背景去除器、翻译器和屏幕录像机。

blocks.html_en: Fliki has made a lot of recent additions to its available tools, making it a more complete video generation and editing platform. For instance, it has introduced new models such as Flux Klein 2, Nano Banana 2 for images, Kling 3.0, Seedance 2.0 for video, native audio, multi-shot, and P-Video for video and lip-syncing needs.

sentences.en: Fliki has made a lot of recent additions to its available tools, making it a more complete video generation and editing platform.
sentences.zh: Fliki 最近对其可用工具进行了许多补充，使其成为一个更完整的视频生成和编辑平台。

sentences.en: For instance, it has introduced new models such as Flux Klein 2, Nano Banana 2 for images, Kling 3.0, Seedance 2.0 for video, native audio, multi-shot, and P-Video for video and lip-syncing needs.
sentences.zh: 例如，它推出了新模型，例如用于图像的 Flux Klein 2、Nano Banana 2，用于视频、原生音频、多重拍摄的 Kling 3.0、Seedance 2.0 以及用于视频和口型同步需求的 P-Video。

blocks.html_en: You can also use your own media in video workflows, along with 130 new character-driven voices in 20+ languages. As recently as February 2026, Fliki rebuilt its voices to include a wider range of emotions, such as laughing, sarcasm, and deadpan, all of which can be fine-tuned using natural language descriptions.

sentences.en: You can also use your own media in video workflows, along with 130 new character-driven voices in 20+ languages.
sentences.zh: 您还可以在视频工作流程中使用您自己的媒体，以及 20 多种语言的 130 个新角色驱动的声音。

sentences.en: As recently as February 2026, Fliki rebuilt its voices to include a wider range of emotions, such as laughing, sarcasm, and deadpan, all of which can be fine-tuned using natural language descriptions.
sentences.zh: 就在 2026 年 2 月，Fliki 重建了其声音，以包含更广泛的情感，例如大笑、讽刺和面无表情，所有这些都可以使用自然语言描述进行微调。

blocks.html_en: Fliki now also supports YouTube-licensed music protected by copyright. It has also expanded its character library, allowing you to create and reuse AI characters across multiple projects.

sentences.en: Fliki now also supports YouTube-licensed music protected by copyright.
sentences.zh: Fliki 现在还支持受版权保护的 YouTube 授权音乐。

sentences.en: It has also expanded its character library, allowing you to create and reuse AI characters across multiple projects.
sentences.zh: 它还扩展了其角色库，允许您在多个项目中创建和重复使用 AI 角色。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Fliki)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：Fliki）

blocks.html_en: One of its most exciting additions has been the ability to create stop-motion story videos with needle-felted wool puppet looks. Another addition is TikTok auto-publishing, which allows you to post videos created through Fliki directly to TikTok by linking your account in Workspace Settings. You can either publish them immediately or set up a drip schedule to release episodes on TikTok.

sentences.en: One of its most exciting additions has been the ability to create stop-motion story videos with needle-felted wool puppet looks.
sentences.zh: 它最令人兴奋的新增功能之一是能够创建具有针毡羊毛木偶外观的定格动画故事视频。

sentences.en: Another addition is TikTok auto-publishing, which allows you to post videos created through Fliki directly to TikTok by linking your account in Workspace Settings.
sentences.zh: 另一个新增功能是 TikTok 自动发布，您可以通过在工作区设置中链接您的帐户，将通过 Fliki 创建的视频直接发布到 TikTok。

sentences.en: You can either publish them immediately or set up a drip schedule to release episodes on TikTok.
sentences.zh: 您可以立即发布它们，也可以设置点滴时间表在 TikTok 上发布剧集。

blocks.html_en: Fliki: Interface and in use

sentences.en: Fliki: Interface and in use
sentences.zh: Fliki：界面和使用

blocks.html_en: Getting started with Fliki is very easy. We used a Google account to sign up for the platform, which took less than a minute. Once you’re in, you’re greeted with a dashboard featuring a black background, along with various features highlighted in small red rectangular tabs below a prompt box.

sentences.en: Getting started with Fliki is very easy.
sentences.zh: Fiki 的入门非常简单。

sentences.en: We used a Google account to sign up for the platform, which took less than a minute.
sentences.zh: 我们使用谷歌账户注册了该平台，整个过程不到一分钟。

sentences.en: Once you’re in, you’re greeted with a dashboard featuring a black background, along with various features highlighted in small red rectangular tabs below a prompt box.
sentences.zh: 进入后，您会看到一个黑色背景的仪表板，以及提示框下方红色小矩形选项卡中突出显示的各种功能。

blocks.html_en: On the left-hand panel, you’ll find all the settings you need for your video creation, including Media, Subtitles, Audio, AI Copilot, and various templates. However, note that not all of these will be accessible if you’re on the free plan, as several features are locked behind Fliki’s paid tiers.

sentences.en: On the left-hand panel, you’ll find all the settings you need for your video creation, including Media, Subtitles, Audio, AI Copilot, and various templates.
sentences.zh: 在左侧面板上，您将找到视频创作所需的所有设置，包括媒体、字幕、音频、AI Copilot 和各种模板。

sentences.en: However, note that not all of these will be accessible if you’re on the free plan, as several features are locked behind Fliki’s paid tiers.
sentences.zh: 但请注意，如果您使用的是免费套餐，则并非所有这些功能都可以使用，因为一些功能被锁定在 Fliki 的付费套餐后面。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: The best part about editing with Fliki is its AI-powered editing assistant, where you can type in plain English what you want. For instance, you can ask it to make the intro slower or add a text overlay at any point in the video.

sentences.en: The best part about editing with Fliki is its AI-powered editing assistant, where you can type in plain English what you want.
sentences.zh: 使用 Fliki 进行编辑的最佳部分是其人工智能编辑助手，您可以在其中用简单的英语输入您想要的内容。

sentences.en: For instance, you can ask it to make the intro slower or add a text overlay at any point in the video.
sentences.zh: 例如，您可以要求它放慢介绍速度或在视频中的任何点添加文本叠加。

blocks.html_en: Besides this, you get two ways to build a video. The first is an at-a-glance scene reel laid out horizontally with a full timeline, while the second is a traditional timeline with functions like zooming and snapping, giving you more control.

sentences.en: Besides this, you get two ways to build a video.
sentences.zh: 除此之外，您还有两种方式来制作视频。

sentences.en: The first is an at-a-glance scene reel laid out horizontally with a full timeline, while the second is a traditional timeline with functions like zooming and snapping, giving you more control.
sentences.zh: 第一个是水平布局的一目了然的场景卷轴，带有完整的时间线，而第二个是传统的时间线，具有缩放和捕捉等功能，为您提供更多控制。

blocks.html_en: Fliki has also overhauled its dashboard, giving it a more intuitive layout with a fresher look and easy-to-access tools.

sentences.en: Fliki has also overhauled its dashboard, giving it a more intuitive layout with a fresher look and easy-to-access tools.
sentences.zh: Fliki 还对其仪表板进行了彻底改造，使其布局更加直观，外观更加新颖，工具也易于访问。

blocks.html_en: Fliki: How we tested

sentences.en: Fliki: How we tested
sentences.zh: Fliki：我们如何测试

blocks.html_en: We used the free version of Fliki to check out its AI video generation capabilities. We entered the following prompt: A woman in a red coat walks across a rain-soaked city street at night, neon signs reflecting in the puddles, camera slowly tracking alongside her (the same prompt we use for all our AI video testing).

sentences.en: We used the free version of Fliki to check out its AI video generation capabilities.
sentences.zh: 我们使用Fliki的免费版本来检查其AI视频生成功能。

sentences.en: We entered the following prompt: A woman in a red coat walks across a rain-soaked city street at night, neon signs reflecting in the puddles, camera slowly tracking alongside her (the same prompt we use for all our AI video testing).
sentences.zh: 我们输入了以下提示：夜间，一名身穿红色外套的女士走过被雨水浸湿的城市街道，霓虹灯标志在水坑中反射，相机慢慢地沿着她的轨迹移动（与我们在所有人工智能视频测试中使用的提示相同）。

blocks.html_en: We were impressed by the sheer number of customization options that Fliki offers. Once you enter the prompt, you have to select the video duration you want, with the minimum being 30 seconds. This was a bit disappointing, as we’d have liked to see shorter video generation options as well.

sentences.en: We were impressed by the sheer number of customization options that Fliki offers.
sentences.zh: Fliki 提供的大量定制选项给我们留下了深刻的印象。

sentences.en: Once you enter the prompt, you have to select the video duration you want, with the minimum being 30 seconds.
sentences.zh: 输入提示后，您必须选择所需的视频时长，最短为 30 秒。

sentences.en: This was a bit disappointing, as we’d have liked to see shorter video generation options as well.
sentences.zh: 这有点令人失望，因为我们也希望看到更短的视频生成选项。

sentences.en: (Image credit: Future)
sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: However, Fliki gets to work once you make the selection and generates a detailed script for you. You can edit this script before moving ahead with video generation. Besides this, you get a lot of options to customize your video right before the generation process starts.

sentences.en: However, Fliki gets to work once you make the selection and generates a detailed script for you.
sentences.zh: 然而，一旦您做出选择，Fliki 就会开始工作并为您生成详细的脚本。

sentences.en: You can edit this script before moving ahead with video generation.
sentences.zh: 您可以在继续生成视频之前编辑此脚本。

sentences.en: Besides this, you get a lot of options to customize your video right before the generation process starts.
sentences.zh: 除此之外，您还可以在生成过程开始之前获得很多选项来自定义视频。

sentences.zh: （图片来源：未来）

blocks.html_en: For instance, you can choose the format and template, selecting between portrait, square, and landscape modes, along with the type of character you want. You can also select the AI model you want to use for generation, although most of them are Pro features. Besides this, you also have the option to select a voiceover, add captions, or choose an AI avatar.

sentences.en: For instance, you can choose the format and template, selecting between portrait, square, and landscape modes, along with the type of character you want.
sentences.zh: 例如，您可以选择格式和模板，在纵向、方形和横向模式之间进行选择，以及您想要的字符类型。

sentences.zh: 您还可以选择要用于生成的 AI 模型，尽管其中大多数都是 Pro 功能。

sentences.en: We found this to be pretty convenient since you can make all the required selections in one place and don’t have to go back and forth through the platform making edits afterward.

blocks.html_en: Fliki: Alternatives

sentences.en: Fliki: Alternatives
sentences.zh: 补丁：替代方案

blocks.html_en: While Fliki is a pretty good AI video generator and editor, it does have a few strong competitors. The first one would be Adobe Firefly, which costs around $8.49 per month, around 40% cheaper than Fliki during the discount period.

sentences.en: While Fliki is a pretty good AI video generator and editor, it does have a few strong competitors.
sentences.zh: 虽然 Fliki 是一个相当不错的人工智能视频生成器和编辑器，但它确实有一些强大的竞争对手。

sentences.en: The first one would be Adobe Firefly, which costs around $8.49 per month, around 40% cheaper than Fliki during the discount period.
sentences.zh: 第一个是 Adob​​e Firefly，每月费用约为 8.49 美元，在折扣期间比 Fliki 便宜约 40%。

content_html_zh:
Fliki 是最好的人工智能视频生成和编辑平台之一，价格与其他类似工具相当，尤其是在折扣季。 其新的仪表板和布局使其易于使用且适合初学者。 您可以根据简单的提示创建视频、生成脚本或直接从单个提示框创建 AI 图像。 还有一个非常方便的人工智能助手可以帮助您使用自然语言输入编辑视频。 也就是说，它的免费计划有点有限，而且如果没有折扣，它可能会有点贵。

Pros

  • +使用 AI Copilot 轻松编辑
  • +授权的 YouTube 音乐
  • +支持定格动画视频
  • +大量定制选项

Cons

  • - 有限的免费计划
  • - 仅限 1080p 视频

为什么您可以信任 TechRadar 我们花费数小时测试我们审查的每项产品或服务，因此您可以确保您购买的是最好的。 详细了解我们如何进行测试。

跳转至：

  • 计划和定价
  • 特征
  • 接口及使用中
  • 我们如何测试
  • 替代方案
  • 最终判决

Fliki 是一款流行的 AI 视频生成器，受到全球超过 1200 万用户和 50,000 家公司的信赖，其中包括 Meta、ByteDance、Oracle 和 PayPal 等品牌。 您可以使用其 AI Copilot 创建和编辑具有自然语言提示的 AI 视频。

在本文中，我们对 Fliki 进行了测试，评估其功能、定价和实际应用内体验，以帮助您了解这款 AI 视频编辑器是否符合其声称以及它是否是适合您的工具。

Fliki：计划和定价

Fliki 是一款功能相当有限的免费视频编辑软件，每月为您提供 3 个学分，或全年 36 个学分。 您可以导出最长一分钟、分辨率为 720p 的视频，并可使用 300 种标准语音。 所有其他视频和音频生成功能都受到免费计划的限制，并受到您收到的积分数量的限制。

最新视频来自

我们发现每月仅提供三个学分是相当吝啬的。 例如，生成一分钟的 AI 视频大约需要 0.8 个积分。 如果包含 AI 头像，则仅花费大约 5.3 个学分。 这意味着除了测试平台之外，您不能使用免费计划做太多事情。

要充分利用 Fliki，您必须订阅其付费计划之一。 其标准计划起价为每月 28 美元。 现在，您可以享受 50% 的订阅折扣，将有效价格降至每月 14 美元。 通过这个计划，你全年可以获得 2,160 个学分，并且在 1080p 分辨率下导出时长增加了 15 分钟，这让我们有点失望。 例如，Kapwing 允许您以大致相同的价格导出 4K 质量的视频。

您可以点击此处查看 Fiki。

也就是说，您可以无限制地访问各种视频和音频工具，以及语音克隆、自定义语音和品牌套件等功能。 您还可以访问各种模板，这些模板可帮助您使用预构建的视频布局创建内容。 该计划还包括多项协作功能，例如从单个 CSV 文件批量创建视频的能力、AI 助手和 Zapier 集成。 然而，它仍然不包括团队协作，这再次令人失望。

你是专业人士吗？ 订阅我们的时事通讯

订阅 TechRadar Pro 时事通讯，获取您的企业成功所需的所有热门新闻、观点、功能和指导！

然后是高级计划，每月费用为 88 美元，当前折扣为每月 44 美元。 此处，最大导出长度增加到 40 分钟，但分辨率仍限制在 1080p。 一些附加功能包括无限的人工智能头像、自定义字体、更快的导出和团队协作。

如果您的积分已用完，并且您有有效的订阅计划，则可以购买充值积分。 这些额外积分的有效期最长为 180 天，即使您在此期间取消订阅，这些积分仍然有效。 您可以花 10 美元获得 60 个积分，花 25 美元获得 130 个积分，依此类推，直至价值 2,500 美元的积分。

补丁：功能

Fliki 拥有多达 54 个用于创建和编辑视频和图像的工具，支持各种用例。 例如，您可以使用 Fliki 创建社交媒体卷轴、TikTok 视频或匿名 YouTube 频道。

还有流行的人工智能头像功能，它可以帮助您构建自己的头像并在视频中重复使用它们。 除此之外，您还可以获得人工智能脚本编写器、语音克隆、字幕生成器和非常有趣的会说话的照片功能。

也就是说，我们发现 Fliki 的人工智能头像主要基于真人，而不是像 Kapwing 这样的网站提供各种稀奇古怪和虚构的角色。

这些最好被视为用例而不是独立功能。 核心功能保持不变：通过提示生成视频和图像。 这些提示可以是脚本、参考图像、视频甚至音频的形式。 编辑工具包括背景去除器、翻译器和屏幕录像机。

Fliki 最近对其可用工具进行了许多补充，使其成为一个更完整的视频生成和编辑平台。 例如，它推出了新模型，例如用于图像的 Flux Klein 2、Nano Banana 2，用于视频、原生音频、多重拍摄的 Kling 3.0、Seedance 2.0 以及用于视频和口型同步需求的 P-Video。

您还可以在视频工作流程中使用您自己的媒体，以及 20 多种语言的 130 个新角色驱动的声音。 就在 2026 年 2 月，Fliki 重建了其声音，以包含更广泛的情感，例如大笑、讽刺和面无表情，所有这些都可以使用自然语言描述进行微调。

Fliki 现在还支持受版权保护的 YouTube 授权音乐。 它还扩展了其角色库，允许您在多个项目中创建和重复使用 AI 角色。

它最令人兴奋的新增功能之一是能够创建具有针毡羊毛木偶外观的定格动画故事视频。 另一个新增功能是 TikTok 自动发布，您可以通过在工作区设置中链接您的帐户，将通过 Fliki 创建的视频直接发布到 TikTok。 您可以立即发布它们，也可以设置点滴时间表在 TikTok 上发布剧集。

Fliki：界面和使用

Fiki 的入门非常简单。 我们使用谷歌账户注册了该平台，整个过程不到一分钟。 进入后，您会看到一个黑色背景的仪表板，以及提示框下方红色小矩形选项卡中突出显示的各种功能。

在左侧面板上，您将找到视频创作所需的所有设置，包括媒体、字幕、音频、AI Copilot 和各种模板。 但请注意，如果您使用的是免费套餐，则并非所有这些功能都可以使用，因为一些功能被锁定在 Fliki 的付费套餐后面。

使用 Fliki 进行编辑的最佳部分是其人工智能编辑助手，您可以在其中用简单的英语输入您想要的内容。 例如，您可以要求它放慢介绍速度或在视频中的任何点添加文本叠加。

除此之外，您还有两种方式来制作视频。 第一个是水平布局的一目了然的场景卷轴，带有完整的时间线，而第二个是传统的时间线，具有缩放和捕捉等功能，为您提供更多控制。

Fliki 还对其仪表板进行了彻底改造，使其布局更加直观，外观更加新颖，工具也易于访问。

Fliki：我们如何测试

我们使用Fliki的免费版本来检查其AI视频生成功能。 我们输入了以下提示：夜间，一名身穿红色外套的女士走过被雨水浸湿的城市街道，霓虹灯标志在水坑中反射，相机慢慢地沿着她的轨迹移动（与我们在所有人工智能视频测试中使用的提示相同）。

Fliki 提供的大量定制选项给我们留下了深刻的印象。 输入提示后，您必须选择所需的视频时长，最短为 30 秒。 这有点令人失望，因为我们也希望看到更短的视频生成选项。

然而，一旦您做出选择，Fliki 就会开始工作并为您生成详细的脚本。 您可以在继续生成视频之前编辑此脚本。 除此之外，您还可以在生成过程开始之前获得很多选项来自定义视频。

例如，您可以选择格式和模板，在纵向、方形和横向模式之间进行选择，以及您想要的字符类型。 您还可以选择要用于生成的 AI 模型，尽管其中大多数都是 Pro 功能。 除此之外，您还可以选择画外音、添加字幕或选择人工智能头像。

我们发现这非常方便，因为您可以在一个地方进行所有必需的选择，而不必在之后来回通过平台进行编辑。 完成所有选择后，我们单击“生成视频”。 实际的视频渲染过程花费了不到一分钟。

然而，由于免费套餐不允许您自行创建人工智能视频，因此我们对输出有点失望。 最终的视频由带有画外音的静态图像组成，而不是像 Kapwing 那样的完整视频。

补丁：替代方案

虽然 Fliki 是一个相当不错的人工智能视频生成器和编辑器，但它确实有一些强大的竞争对手。 第一个是 Adob​​e Firefly，每月费用约为 8.49 美元，在折扣期间比 Fliki 便宜约 40%。

Firefly 的最大优势是其强大的工作流程功能，允许团队构建虚拟故事板并实时协作，这是 Fliki 仅限于其最高层计划的功能。 您还可以访问 Adob​​e Express Premium 和 Photoshop 及其所有付费计划。 尽管如此，它的视频编辑功能仍在开发中，不如 Fliki。

另一个竞争对手是 Kapwing，它具有更好的 AI 头像生成功能。 虽然 Fliki 在很大程度上依赖于现实生活中的角色，但 Kapwing 为您提供了大量虚构角色生成选项，例如德古拉、吸血鬼以及您能想象到的所有其他角色。
